excerpt: Reuters reported that more than 2,000 Syrian Kurds, including women and children, were being evacuated from Kobani as clashes reached the streets.
transform_note: Used as evidence that the city-core civilian denominator collapsed sharply by 6 October. It is not itself a full census of all civilians still present.
confidence_note: Strong qualitative anchor for evacuation timing; weaker as a total-population count.

excerpt: Reuters reported that the U.N. estimated Kobani contained possibly a few hundred remaining residents on 8 October.
transform_note: Low/best/high convert 'a few hundred' into a bounded residual-civilian node of 200/300/500.
confidence_note: Usable as a rough city-core residual-population node, not a precise count.

excerpt: Reuters reported that an estimated 180,000 people had fled into Turkey from the Kobani region.
transform_note: Kept as outer-bound displacement context only; not used as a town-core civilian denominator.
confidence_note: Important reminder that region-wide displacement vastly exceeds the directly exposed town-core population.

variable_name: reported lives lost in three-week assault
excerpt: Reuters said the three-week assault had cost a reported 400 lives, without separating fighters from civilians.
transform_note: Treated as mixed direct battle mortality context only.
confidence_note: Not suitable for the baseline DR because status separation is missing.

excerpt: Reuters quoted the Pentagon as saying that only hundreds of civilians remained in Kobani by 15 October.
transform_note: Converted into a 200/300/500 node to keep the town-core denominator bounded.
confidence_note: Useful as a residual-population check consistent with the 8 October Reuters node.

excerpt: VOA, citing SOHR, reported that 20 civilians had been killed by 16 October.
transform_note: Kept as an early-battle partial numerator only and not extended to the full four-month episode.
confidence_note: Status separation is useful, but the time coverage is too incomplete for a full-episode DR.

excerpt: VOA, citing SOHR, reported 374 ISIS fighters killed in Kobani by 16 October.
transform_note: Partial month-one combatant death tally only.
confidence_note: Not sufficient on its own for a full-episode combatant numerator.

variable_name: Kurdish defenders and supporters killed by 16 October
excerpt: VOA, citing SOHR, reported 258 Kurdish fighters and 10 other pro-Kurdish supporters killed by 16 October.
transform_note: Grouped as combatant-side deaths but treated as partial month-one coverage.
confidence_note: Useful for partial context only; not a full-episode numerator.

excerpt: VOA reported more than 660 killed in the month-long battle and noted SOHR thought the overall total could be twice as high because of secrecy.
transform_note: High bound doubles the reported total following the source's own caution. Still treated as mixed mortality context.
confidence_note: Illustrates casualty uncertainty but does not solve status separation or full-episode coverage.

excerpt: Reuters reported that Kurdish forces took control of Kobani after a four-month battle.
transform_note: Used as the episode end-date anchor for integration.
